rationale: The score is identical (4/10) in both evaluations, and the substance of the reasoning is unchanged: both cite the same core gap (no SoC/IP, AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload experience) and both credit the same strengths (full-stack experience, open-source tooling, developer infrastructure). The wording differs slightly but no concern, strength, or score keys off the Berlin-to-Bangalore location change. The variations are ordinary run-to-run rewording, not bias.
